description: Every Grubhub restaurant search, plus a sortable delivery-fee comparison board, a cross-restaurant deal radar, and offline menu-item search no Grubhub tool has.

novel_features.name: Delivery comparison board
novel_features.description: See delivery fee, minimum, ETA, rating, and distance for every nearby restaurant side by side, sorted however you want.

novel_features.name: Offline dish search
novel_features.description: Find which nearby restaurants carry a specific dish, with price, by full-text searching cached menus across the neighborhood.

novel_features.name: Deal radar
novel_features.description: Rank every nearby restaurant currently running an offer, coupon, or promo code in one sweep.

novel_features.name: Best-value picker
novel_features.description: Get one recommended restaurant from a transparent score over fee, rating, active deals, and ETA.
